title: ContractInterpretation
description: Output of the contract-interpreter agent. Plain-English answer to a specific question about a contract clause, with supporting citations and confidence.

answer.description: Plain-English answer to the question. Default 100–300 words; may be longer for complex questions.

supporting_clauses.description: Contract clauses that directly support the answer.

verbatim.description: Verbatim text of the supporting clause.

why_relevant.description: 1-2 sentences explaining why this clause is relevant to the answer.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0–1. 1.0 = answer is unambiguous from explicit contract text; 0.0 = highly uncertain (clause absent, ambiguous, or conflicting).

caveats.description: Situations where the answer could be wrong or depend on additional context.

disclaimer.const: AI-generated analysis. This is not legal advice. Review with qualified counsel before relying on it for any binding decision.
